stories.headline: Cognition AI Raises $1 Billion at $26 Billion Valuation to Scale AI Coding Platform Devin
stories.key_takeaway: Cognition AI more than doubled its valuation to $26 billion in eight months, raising over $1 billion as its AI coding agent Devin drives revenue from $37M to $492M in a single year.

pull_quote.text: We launched Devin two years ago as the first AI software engineer. Since then, cloud agents have gone from niche to mainstream.

stories.article_excerpt: Cognition AI, the startup behind the autonomous coding agent Devin, announced Wednesday that it has raised more than $1 billion in a Series D

stories.headline: Fireworks AI in Talks for Funding at $15 Billion Valuation as Inference Market Heats Up
stories.key_takeaway: Fireworks AI is seeking a $15B valuation just seven months after its $4B Series C, driven by 416% YoY revenue growth in the booming inference infrastructure market.

pull_quote.text: We actually are automated customization. That is what we are building, not just inference.

stories.article_excerpt: Seven months after closing a $250 million Series C at a $4 billion valuation, Fireworks AI is in discussions to raise a new funding

stories.headline: Kuaishou in Talks to Raise Funding for Kling AI Video Unit Ahead of Potential IPO
stories.key_takeaway: Kuaishou is seeking $2 billion at a $20 billion valuation to spin off Kling AI, its video generation unit whose ARR has doubled to $500 million.

pull_quote.text: AI technologies continued to provide the momentum for our content prosperity, business growth and organisational efficiency improvement.

stories.article_excerpt: Kuaishou Technology is preparing to carve out its AI video generator Kling as a standalone company, seeking to raise $2 billion in a pre-IPO fu

stories.headline: Dun and Bradstreet Rebuilds Entire Commercial Data Graph So AI Agents Can Query Business Records
stories.key_takeaway: D&B rebuilt its 642-million-company Commercial Graph from human-oriented dashboards to an agent-native knowledge graph with MCP-based access.

pull_quote.text: We need to think about agents as our new consumer category, evolving from our standard credit analysts to also now catering to these customers agents.
pull_quote.role: Chief Data and Analytics Officer, Dun and Bradstreet

stories.article_excerpt: For nearly two centuries, Dun and Bradstreet has been the definitive source of commercial intelligence. Now, the firm has undertaken perh

stories.headline: Tensormesh Raises $20 Million to Cut AI Inference Latency With KV Cache Reuse Platform
stories.key_takeaway: Tensormesh raised $20M from AMD Ventures, NVentures, and CoreWeave to launch its KV cache reuse platform claiming up to 10x reductions in latency and cost.

pull_quote.text: Behind the term KV cache is a whole concept of AI interpretation of the question it is asked. This makes it a whole new class of data.

stories.article_excerpt: Every time an enterprise AI system fields a prompt, its GPUs grind through the same context window from scratch. Tensormesh raised $20M to end that.

stories.headline: Google Launches Gemini 3.5 Flash and Gemini Omni Models at I/O 2026
stories.key_takeaway: Google shipped Gemini 3.5 Flash as a frontier-grade model that beats its own 3.1 Pro on coding and agentic benchmarks while running 4x faster at $1.50/$9.00 per million tokens.

pull_quote.text: 3.5 Pro becomes your orchestrator, your planner, and then it actually can leverage Flash to be the various sub-agents.
pull_quote.role: Senior Director and Head of Product, Google

stories.article_excerpt: Google used its annual I/O developer conference to unveil two new model families that together represent the company's clearest declaration yet

stories.headline: Google Search Enters Agent Era With Background Information Agents and Custom Generative UI
stories.key_takeaway: Google is replacing its 25-year-old search box with an AI-powered agent platform that monitors the web 24/7 and generates custom UIs on the fly.

pull_quote.text: the biggest upgrade to our iconic search box since its debut over 25 years ago

stories.article_excerpt: Google has unveiled the most sweeping overhaul of its flagship Search product in more than 25 years, replacing the iconic search box with an

stories.headline: Salesforce Ships Agentforce Coworker Embedding AI Teammates Into CRM Search Interfaces
stories.key_takeaway: Salesforce embeds an autonomous AI agent into every CRM search bar via Agentforce Coworker, letting users converse with their entire CRM in plain language.

pull_quote.text: We already know that AI agents can scale our cost structure infinitely, but the real unlock is that they can help us scale our capacity, too.

stories.article_excerpt: Salesforce is betting that the future of enterprise AI starts in the search bar. CEO Marc Benioff unveiled Agentforce Cow

stories.headline: OpenAI Tells US It Will Spend $50 Billion on AI Infrastructure in 2026
stories.key_takeaway: OpenAI projected $50 billion compute spend in 2026 represents a 1,700-fold increase from 2017, signaling an unprecedented capital arms race in AI infrastructure.

pull_quote.text: Infrastructure is destiny, and we need a lot more of it.

stories.article_excerpt: OpenAI plans to spend $50 billion on computing power this year alone, a figure that dwarfs the annual capital expenditure of most Fortune 500 comp

stories.headline: MassRobotics Healthcare Robotics Showcase Features AI-Guided Dentistry to Pharmacy Automation
stories.key_takeaway: MassRobotics fifth Healthcare Robotics Startup Catalyst cohort of 11 startups showcases at the Robotics Summit in Boston, spanning AI-guided dentistry to pharmacy automation.

pull_quote.text: The Healthcare Robotics Startup Catalyst was created to bridge the gap between technological possibility and clinical reality.

stories.article_excerpt: Eleven startups spanning robotic surgery, autonomous pharmacy sorting, and AI-powered dental care take the stage at the Robotics Summit

stories.headline: Study of 100,000 People Finds Generative AI Now Outperforms Humans on Creativity Tests
stories.key_takeaway: AI models like GPT-4 now exceed average human creativity on the Divergent Association Task, but the top 10% of creative humans still dramatically outperform all AI systems.

pull_quote.text: Generative AI has above all become an extremely powerful tool in the service of human creativity: it will not replace creators, but profoundly transform how they imagine, explore, and create.
pull_quote.role: Professor of Psychology, Universite de Montreal

data_points.label: Creative humans who outscored all AI

stories.article_excerpt: In what researchers are calling a turning point for artificial intelligence, a landmark study published in Scientific Reports has found that lead

stories.headline: Four Chinese Labs Ship Open-Weight Coding Models Matching Western Frontier Performance in 12-Day Sprint
stories.key_takeaway: Four Chinese labs shipped open-weight coding models within 12 days that cluster within 3-6 points of Western frontier systems on SWE-Bench Pro, at one-third or less the inference cost.

pull_quote.text: The headline writes itself: China caught up. The headline is half right. The benchmark gap narrowed; it did not close.

stories.article_excerpt: Between April 12 and April 24, four Chinese AI laboratories released open-weight coding models in rapid succession, each targeting the autonomous

stories.headline: China Widens Travel Restrictions on AI Researchers Amid Rising Technology Tensions
stories.key_takeaway: Beijing now requires private-sector AI researchers at firms like Alibaba and DeepSeek to obtain government approval before traveling abroad, extending controls previously reserved for nuclear scientists.

pull_quote.text: Carrots are more important than sticks.

data_points.label: Performance gap between top US and Chinese AI models
Value of Meta Manus acquisition Beijing demanded unwound
Rare earth materials under export controls

stories.headline: US Treasury Secretary Calls Bank Chiefs Meeting Over Anthropic Mythos Cybersecurity Risks
stories.key_takeaway: Treasury Secretary Bessent and Fed Chair Powell convened an emergency meeting with five major bank CEOs over systemic cybersecurity risks from Anthropic Mythos model, which found 10,000+ zero-day vulnerabilities.

pull_quote.text: Advanced AI capabilities have become a top national security concern -- one that could threaten the very foundation of the U.S. financial system.
pull_quote.role: Senior banking executives briefed on the session

stories.article_excerpt: When Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent and Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell jointly summon Wall Street most powerful executives to an unsc

stories.headline: AI Regulation Becomes Core Operating Model as Enterprises Face Compliance Crossfire
stories.key_takeaway: With 1,200+ state AI bills and EU AI Act enforcement ramping up, enterprises must treat AI compliance as a core operating model capability.

pull_quote.text: The balance between too many regulations, it is terrible; too few, we may not love the outcome, so we got to find the Goldilocks middle.

data_points.label: AI bills across US state legislatures
EU AI Act full enforcement deadline

stories.article_excerpt: The era of treating AI compliance as a future concern is over. With more than 1,200 AI-related bills introduced across U.S. state legislatures
